tokens.@COLS: Maximum image width used to specialize the hardware function.
tokens.@NPC: Pixels processed per clock cycle selected by the composition layer.
tokens.@ROWS: Maximum image height used to specialize the hardware function.
tokens.@TYPE: Vitis Vision input/output pixel type selected by the composition layer.
tokens.@input: Input stream or matrix generated by the previous pipeline step.
tokens.@output: Output stream or matrix consumed by the next pipeline step.
tokens.@INTERPOLATION: Interpolation policy resolved by the same configuration used by HLS composition.
tokens.@BORDER_TYPE: Border handling policy resolved by the same configuration used by HLS composition.
tokens.@matrix: Transform matrix provided by the concrete test configuration.
tokens.@dsize: Output size provided by the concrete test configuration.
